questionHtml:
What is the correct comparison of H–N–H bond angles in NH2-, NH3, and NH4+?


A.  NH2− < NH3 < NH4+

B.  NH4+ < NH3 < NH2−

C.  NH3 < NH2− < NH4+

D.  NH3 < NH4+ < NH2−

meta.title: What is the correct comparison of H–N–H bond angles in NH2-, NH3, and NH4+? A. NH2− < NH3 < NH4+ B. NH4+ < NH3 < NH2− C. NH3 < NH2− < NH4+ D. NH3 < NH4+ < NH2−
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
